title: Phase 32.4 — Discovered-Not-Indexed Investigation
note: GSC Pages report count (503) is authoritative. The 615 sitemap-minus-impressions number includes indexed pages with 0 impressions — it's an overestimate. Use 503 as the baseline.

top_50_analysis.method: Sitemap URL pattern classification. Full URL-level extraction via CloakBrowser unavailable (pagination broken for >10 URLs per group).

categories: tools (31) — noindexed compound-interest, mortgage, loan variants
No confirmed duplicate/thin — all pages are unique URLs

note_on_tools: The 31 tools in discovered-not-indexed are noindexed pages that should NOT be indexed. Google correctly refuses to index them. They should be removed from the sitemap to clean up the discovered-not-indexed count.
note_on_guides: The 27 guides are 'how to use X calculator' pages. Many are noindexed or thin. They add noise to the discovered-not-indexed count but don't represent lost opportunity.
actual_lost_opportunity: The true loss is the ~128 high-value (A-tier) pages that are discovered but not indexed. These include 21 calculators, 4 Phase 32 scenario pages, 1 decision page, and the 3 hub pages. These are pages that SHOULD be indexed.
